commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fa1d34f213e4492778a5941c7bde21a70af4d68c)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `cron.maintenance` configuration, cron and heartbeat maintenance-window gating, deferred cron/heartbeat replay state, cron status/protocol diagnostics, docs, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +780, Tests +756, Docs +22, Generated 0. Total +1558 across 28 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings from source inspection: deferred heartbeat replay drops `source`/`intent`, and manual cron gating lacks the `DEFAULT_AGENT_ID` fallback used by the timer path. I did not run tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused automated repair can address the two concrete code blockers, while the public config/API approval remains a maintainer decision afterward.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
